data.description: The Wall Street Journal: Iran has demanded to retain its missile program without making any effort to curtail it

data.title: Baltimore files lawsuit against Elon Musk's X and xAI for deepfake technology, testing legality of local regulations.
data.description: A legal case in Baltimore is set to challenge the responsibility of xAI, an artificial intelligence company, under local law after federal regulation fell short. This consumer protection suit will examine if AI companies can be held accountable at the local level.
Samsung sends gifts, message of support to employees in Middle East-yonhap
Indonesia’s finance minister says the 2026 average oil price is still projected at $74 per barrel, with the budget remaining safe.

data.title: Space Quarters Successfully Demonstrates Space Welding Technology for Metals and Regolith-based Construction Materials Under Ultra-high Vacuum, Microgravity, and Lunar Gravity Conditions Toward Realizing Space Architecture
data.description: In Tokyo, Space Quarters Inc. recently completed successful aircraft-based demonstration tests for space welding. This included working with metals and construction materials made from lunar regolith in settings mimicking space conditions like ultra-high vacuum and various types of gravity simulations. The company confirmed the reliability of joints and bonding strength under these challenging conditions. The tests were carried out using a high-vacuum chamber that was equipped on an aircraft.
According to Nikkei’s report, Alibaba’s RISC-V Server CPU is manufactured on TSMC’s 5nm process.

data.title: Fujitsu and The University of Osaka develop new technologies for chemical material energy calculations on early-FTQC quantum computers
data.description: In Tokyo on March 25, 2026, Fujitsu Limited and the Center for Quantum Information and Quantum Biology at The University of Osaka revealed a significant advancement in quantum computing. They have partnered to accelerate the integration of quantum computers in drug discovery and the creation of new materials. This collaboration aims to leverage the potential of quantum technology to enhance scientific research.

data.title: Yimutian Inc. Announces Resignation of Independent Director
data.description: On March 25, 2026, Yimutian Inc. (NASDAQ: YMT) disclosed the resignation of Junchen Sun from their Board of Directors, effective March 17, 2026. Sun, an independent director, stepped down from his position.

data.title: Strongpoint Partners Celebrates a Year of Landmark Growth
data.description: With the support of additional partners and a growing leadership team, Strongpoint Partners is solidifying its position as the top retirement and payroll platform in the country for small to medium-sized businesses. The company has made significant investments in personnel, procedures, and infrastructure to enhance its services.

data.title: Tillo Celebrates 10 Years as The Leading Rewards, Incentives and Gift Card Platform
data.description: Tillo, a prominent embedded rewards and incentives platform, recently commemorated its ten-year milestone, signifying a decade of influencing the global rewards sector. The platform serves as a key player in empowering numerous forward-thinking fintechs, loyalty platforms, and enterprises. Its extensive reach encompasses connecting with a multitude of these entities, highlighting its significance in the industry.

data.title: Sparkoz Announces Major Expansion into Canadian Market with Suite of Autonomous Cleaning Solutions
data.description: A new player in the Canadian market, Sparkoz, has launched its autonomous cleaning robot technology to combat labor shortages and increasing operational expenses in facility management. The company is rolling out a selection of AI-driven robotic scrubbers and vacuums tailored to tackle these challenges.

data.title: Alarming New Study: Deepfake X-Rays Fool Radiologists and AI
data.description: A study published today in the Radiology journal revealed that both radiologists and multimodal large language models (LLMs) face challenges in distinguishing between artificial intelligence (AI)-generated "deepfake" X-ray images and authentic ones. The research highlighted the difficulty in accurately identifying these AI-created images.

data.title: ShipperHQ Launches ShipperHQ.ai, a Shipping Intelligence Platform Purpose-Built for Ecommerce
data.description: A cutting-edge platform based on artificial intelligence has been launched, merging shipping expertise with AI agents to assist merchants in enhancing conversion rates, safeguarding profit margins, and optimizing shipping strategies. This groundbreaking solution was introduced in Austin, Texas on March 24, 2026. ShipperHQ, a prominent platform specializing in shipping and checkout experiences, unveiled this innovative AI-native system.

data.title: Smart Start Expands into the Intelligent Speed Assistance Market with Speed Aware™
data.description: Smart Start continues its commitment to enhancing road safety by implementing advanced speed management technology. The company, based in Grapevine, Texas, disclosed on March 24, 2026, its expansion into the realm of intelligent alcohol monitoring solutions. As a prominent player in this sector globally, Smart Start aims to contribute to saving lives and fostering secure communities.

data.title: Inman, a leading source of real estate news, events, and intelligenceAppoints Tom Bohn as Chief Executive Officer
data.description: Recently in Tallahassee, Florida, Inman, a prominent provider of real estate information, revealed that Tom Bohn will become the new Chief Executive Officer starting April 2, 2026. Tom Bohn will be taking over the position from Emily Paquette, who is resigning after serving for a significant period.
Israel’s military reports detecting missiles fired from Iran, indicating heightened regional tensions.
Russia’s Defence Ministry claims it intercepted and destroyed 389 Ukrainian drones overnight, indicating continued aerial escalation.

data.title: Jeremiah Davidson marks publishing debut with the release of 'Beyond the Burn: Integrating Purposeful Humanity'
data.description: A new book has been released in Boulder, Colorado on March 25, 2026, that condenses 20 years of community leadership and creative involvement into a guide for intentional living. The author, a winner of the Hay House Writer's Competition and a newcomer to writing, spent 18 years actively engaging in the Burning Man event. This book encapsulates their experiences and offers a framework for readers to apply intentional living principles in their own lives.

data.title: Polyplastics' DURACON(R) POM Adopted for Ground-breaking Crawler Transport System
data.description: In Tokyo on March 25, 2026, it was announced that Polyplastics Co., Ltd.'s DURACON(R) POM resin has been chosen for incorporation in a distinctive crawler track transport system created by CuboRex Co., Ltd., an established provider of inventive mobility solutions based in Tokyo. The transport system stands out for its uniqueness and utilizes the DURACON(R) POM resin in its design.
